overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark, narrow stone corridor in a medieval setting at night. The camera moves steadily forward between high stone walls toward a distant gate opening, with low visibility and atmospheric horror-game aesthetics.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dark stone corridor toward the gate opening ahead

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the left side of the path
tall weathered stone wall running along the right side of the path
stone tower structure projecting from the left wall with conical roof
uneven dirt and cobblestone path surface
dark archway opening at the end of the corridor leading to exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow, dark stone corridor between high medieval walls. A stone gatehouse tower is visible on the left while the path leads toward a dark archway ahead. The ground is uneven dirt, and the atmosphere is ominous with very low visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic medieval passage that leads toward a looming architectural threshold. It begins by gliding steadily forward through a narrow, dark stone corridor flanked by high, oppressive walls. As the camera advances over the uneven dirt ground, the perspective passes a stone gatehouse tower on the left. The scene then narrows its focus toward a dark archway ahead, where the ominous atmosphere and low visibility intensify as the path draws closer to the distant opening.
